title: Multi-Vendor Food Ordering Platform
summary: A frontend-only multi-vendor food ordering UI with real-time order tracking, vendor dashboards, and responsive mobile-first design.
description: Frontend UI for a multi-vendor food ordering platform with vendor dashboards and real-time order tracking
outcomes: Designed a responsive multi-vendor ordering interface with separate customer and vendor views
Built a real-time order tracking UI with status progression and vendor-specific sub-order displays
Implemented offline-capable vendor dashboard using localStorage for unreliable network conditions
